summary: Added a generated-art Lane Genesis Foundry between Expansion Forge and Creator Kit so future lanes, minigames, bot sockets, art kits, proof trails, and open slots become a reusable launch pipeline for forkable agent-company repos.

generated_asset.prompt_summary: Premium dark sci-fi lane genesis foundry with modular lane rails, minigame cartridges, avatar pods, bot sockets, proof gates, repo blueprint tiles, teal/green/amber/coral/violet accents, no readable text, no logos, no faces.

ui_contract: Render a Lane Genesis Foundry between Expansion Forge and Creator Kit.
Use generated lane-genesis-foundry-20260618.png as the launch-pipeline backdrop and Visual Asset Vault entry.
Derive blueprint cards from Expansion Forge families, lane visuals, minigame registry hooks, bound bots, counts, and proof signals without adding snapshot schema.
Expose five launch gates per family: lane seed, art kit, minigame, bot socket, and proof path.
Show generated-art stats for blueprints, open slots, game modules, art kits, and bot sockets.
Expose FORGE, GAMES, ASSETS, and BOTS actions through existing Atlas surfaces.
Let lane-bound blueprint cards drill into the source lane Game view.
Render future sockets for new lanes so larger repos can keep expanding.
Keep animation transform/opacity-based and covered by reduced-motion handling.

red_green.red: pytest tests\test_agent_company_atlas_lane_genesis_foundry.py -q failed before implementation on missing laneGenesisFoundry element wiring.
red_green.green: pytest tests\test_agent_company_atlas_lane_genesis_foundry.py -q passed after generated asset, renderer, styles, docs, cache token, handlers, and Asset Vault wiring.

action_results: ASSETS -> Visual Asset Vault visible with all filter active and Lane Genesis Foundry entry present
Lane genesis card -> selected ai_ml_competitions Game view with active game tab

responsive.evidence: All checked viewports rendered the Lane Genesis Foundry with generated art loaded at 1693x929 natural size, five stats, six blueprint cards, eight future slots, four local actions, zero bad rects, zero button text overflow, zero panel overflow, zero page horizontal overflow, and zero console errors.
